description: Create a GitHub Actions CI workflow for Windows using Conda. The workflow triggers on push and pull request events, ignoring certain paths. It runs a build job with a matrix strategy for different compilers on Windows, and a separate check job on Ubuntu. The build job checks out the repository, sets up caching, installs Miniconda, and builds and tests a project using CMake and Ninja. The check job verifies the success of the build job.
